plugin.name: Data Cleaner
plugin.description: Trim strings, drop empty rows, fill nulls, and save a cleaned workbook to the configured output path.
title: Data Cleaner
description: Clean an Excel workbook and write the resulting file to your configured output directory.
option.drop: Drop rows that are completely empty
option.fill: Fill remaining null cells with NULL_VALUE
summary.ready: Choose a workbook to begin cleaning.
summary.done: Cleaned {file_name} and reduced rows from {start_rows} to {end_rows}.
error.missing_input.title: Missing Input
command.run.title: Run Data Cleaner
command.run.description: Clean an Excel workbook and write a new output file.
